name: Austral Gold Limited
description: Austral Gold Limited is a growing gold and silver mining, development, and exploration company building a portfolio of quality assets in the Americas. The company's flagship assets are its Guanaco and Amancaya mines in Chile, and the Casposo mine in Argentina. Austral Gold is focused on funding its growth through cash flow from its operating mines and leveraging its strong regional relationships to acquire and develop high-potential projects.
